title: A Fabumouse School Adventure
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo braves a chaotic Career Day at his nephew's school and ends up being honored as the school's most famous graduate! 🏫

q.zh: 杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿的工作是什么？

options.en: He is a chef who makes cheese
options.zh: 他是一位做奶酪的厨师

options.en: He is a famous movie actor
options.zh: 他是一位著名的电影演员

options.en: He studies volcanoes for a living according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他以研究火山为职业（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He writes, edits, and publishes a newspaper
options.zh: 他写稿、当编辑并出版报纸

explain.en: Geronimo says he is a writer, editor, and publisher of The Rodent's Gazette, the most famous newspaper on Mouse Island.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩说自己是一位作家、编辑，也是老鼠岛上最著名的报纸《鼠民公报》的出版人。

q.en: Whose school Career Day did Geronimo attend as a guest speaker?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩作为嘉宾参加了谁学校的职业日？

options.zh: 他自己母校的同学聚会

explain.en: Benjamin invited his uncle to speak on Career Day at Little Tails Academy, his school.
explain.zh: 本杰明邀请叔叔到他所在的小尾巴学院，在职业日上演讲。

q.en: What time did Geronimo's alarm clock ring that morning?
q.zh: 那天早上杰罗尼摩的闹钟几点响的？

options.en: 7:30 A.M. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 早上七点半（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The alarm rang at 6:30 A.M., a whole hour before Geronimo usually got up.
explain.zh: 闹钟在早上六点半响起，比杰罗尼摩平时起床的时间整整早了一个小时。

q.en: What kind of animal is Spike, the class pet?
q.zh: 班级宠物斯派克是什么动物？

options.zh: 一只长着鳞片的绿色壁虎

options.en: A playful brown dog according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一只爱玩的棕色小狗（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: When Spike escaped, Geronimo gasped and saw that Spike was a scaly green gecko.
explain.zh: 斯派克逃出来时，杰罗尼摩惊讶地发现它是一只长着绿色鳞片的壁虎。

q.en: Who is the kind custodian that keeps rescuing Geronimo?
q.zh: 一直帮助解救杰罗尼摩的那位善良的校工是谁？

explain.en: Henry Handipaws, the school custodian, pulled Geronimo down from the flagpole and rescued him from the slide.
explain.zh: 学校的校工亨利·汉迪波把杰罗尼摩从旗杆上拉下来，又把他从滑梯里救出来。

q.en: Who was Geronimo's greatest school rival, now the principal?
q.zh: 谁是杰罗尼摩学生时代最大的对手，如今成了校长？

options.en: Miss Angel Paws according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 安杰尔·波老师（按书中另一种说法）
维罗妮卡·斯蒂夫惠斯克

explain.en: Geronimo ran into Veronica Stiffwhiskers in the hallway and learned she is now the school's principal.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩在走廊里撞见维罗妮卡·斯蒂夫惠斯克，才知道她现在是这所学校的校长。

q.en: What two ingredients mix to make Professor Magmamouse's volcano erupt?
q.zh: 岩浆鼠教授做火山喷发实验时，是哪两种材料混合在一起？

options.en: Cheese and mold according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 奶酪和霉菌（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book's experiment says when baking soda mixes with vinegar, it forms a foam like lava.
explain.zh: 书中的实验说明，小苏打和醋混合时会产生像熔岩一样的泡沫。

q.en: How many triple-decker cheese sandwiches did Geronimo help make?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩帮忙做了多少个三层奶酪三明治？

options.en: 100 according to some versions of the story

explain.en: Geronimo helped Lulu make 757 triple-decker sandwiches for the class lunch.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩帮露露为全班午餐做了757个三层奶酪三明治。

q.en: What prize did Geronimo win for his reporting?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩因为新闻报道获得了什么奖？

explain.en: The principal said Geronimo won a Ratitzer Prize for his scoop on The Curse of the Cheese Pyramid.
explain.zh: 校长说杰罗尼摩凭借《奶酪金字塔的诅咒》的独家报道获得了老鼠普利策奖。

q.en: What did the principal give Geronimo to honor him?
q.zh: 校长为了表彰杰罗尼摩，送了他什么？

options.en: A wheel of cheese according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一块圆形奶酪（按书中另一种说法）
一块刻着他名字的纪念牌

explain.en: Veronica presented Geronimo with a plaque engraved with his name to display in the school trophy case.
explain.zh: 维罗妮卡送给杰罗尼摩一块刻着他名字的纪念牌，放在学校的荣誉陈列柜里展示。
